ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol used in the experiment */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, on hold, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_funding_source FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher (e.g., postdoc, professor) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, institute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cells used in the sample */,
  "reagents_used" TEXT /* Reagents used in the sample preparation */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the sample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions of the sample */,
  "preparation_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was prepared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the measurement belongs to */,
  "fsc_a" REAL /* Forward scatter area (FSC-A) */,
  "ssc_a" REAL /* Side scatter area (SSC-A) */,
  "ssc_w" REAL /* Side scatter width (SSC-W) */,
  "mcherry_a" REAL /* mCherry area (mCherry-A) */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "instrument_settings" TEXT /* Settings of the instrument used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the annotation belongs to */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., notes, comments) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being accessed */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment or sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment or sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "funding_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id")
)
